photojournalism.newsExtreme.title: News extreme
photojournalism.newsExtreme.description: Catastrophic, world-altering, and extreme global news events and disasters
examples: an underground nuclear waste facility suffers a critical breach, triggering a massive regional evacuation
a massive avalanche buries a famous alpine ski resort, trapping hundreds of tourists
a major tech company's headquarters is destroyed in a terrorist attack
a massive heatwave hits a major city, causing widespread power outages and water shortages
a major celebrity's private life is exposed in a major scandal
a group of hackers successfully steal millions from a major bank

photojournalism.newsNormal.title: News normal
photojournalism.newsNormal.description: Standard major news headlines covering science, politics, business, and society
examples: a new scientific discovery, such as a new species of animal or a groundbreaking new technology
a breakthrough in the fight against cancer or other major diseases
a major international airport suffers a system-wide it failure, grounding hundreds of commercial flights
a major political scandal, involving allegations of corruption or abuse of power
a major business scandal, such as a ponzi scheme or insider trading
a major educational development, such as a new policy or program aimed at improving student outcomes

photojournalism.newsSpecific.title: News specific
photojournalism.newsSpecific.description: Highly detailed, specific descriptions of major global news events and crises
examples: a mass protest against police brutality and systemic racism: thousands march through the streets of new york city, demanding justice for victims of police violence and systemic racism in the criminal justice system
a major civil rights movement: the black lives matter movement gains widespread support and leads to major policy changes, including police reform and the removal of confederate statues
a stunning scientific achievement: fusion energy researchers achieve net energy gain for the first time, marking a major milestone for clean power
a historic space launch: the world's most powerful rocket lifts off from cape canaveral, carrying a new space telescope to study the early universe
a major celebrity scandal: a top hollywood actor is caught in a massive cheating scandal, leading to the collapse of his marriage and a major hit to his career
a bold environmental protest: activists scale a major oil rig in the north sea, unfurling a massive banner protesting deep-sea drilling

photojournalism.styleProtest.title: Style protest
photojournalism.styleProtest.description: Various photographic styles and techniques used in photojournalism and documentary photography
examples: extreme wide-angle photography: using wide lenses to include both the protesters in the foreground and the grand architectural context in the background
panoramic photography: capturing the scale and size of large-scale protests and demonstrations
black and white photography: creating a timeless and classic aesthetic that emphasizes contrast and emotion
forced perspective photography: composing elements at different distances to create a striking visual relationship or a sense of scale
cinematic photojournalism: utilizing anamorphic lenses, wide aspect ratios, and dramatic color grading to evoke a movie-like atmosphere
action photography: capturing the movement and energy of the protesters in action

photojournalism.types.title: Types of photojournalism
photojournalism.types.description: Diverse subjects and thematic beats covered in photojournalism and documentary reporting
examples: investigative reporting on government corruption and scandals
conflict resolution and peacekeeping missions, focusing on diplomatic efforts and peacekeepers in the field
coverage of student protests and movements, including those for gun control and against student debt
advocacy photojournalism, documenting specific causes to raise awareness and inspire social change

set.moviegenBench.title: Benchmark prompt set from MovieGenBench
set.moviegenBench.description: MovieGen Video Bench contains 1003 diverse prompts testing various aspects including human activities (motion, emotions), animals, nature/scenery, physics (fluids, gravity, collisions), and unusual subjects/activities. The prompts provide comprehensive coverage across high, medium and low motion scenarios.
examples: A man munching on popcorn while watching a movie.
an adorable kangaroo wearing blue jeans and a white t shirt taking a pleasant stroll in Johannesburg South Africa during a colorful festival
A little girl and her mother are eating watermelon, which is cut in half. The mother scoops out the sweetest part from the middle of the watermelon with a spoon and hands it to the girl.
A tree root bursting through the seat of an ancient, weathered bench, intertwining with the wood.
A pedestal up through a dense forest floor, rising to show the sunlight filtering through the treetops.
a toy robot wearing purple overalls and cowboy boots taking a pleasant stroll in Mumbai India during a beautiful sunset
